prestazioni: Replace the original Ford FE 427 side-oiler V8 (engine code: 427 FE-SO) with a fully built **Dart Machinery 496ci FE stroker kit** featuring forged **Manley 4340 steel crankshaft**, **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, and **JE 12.5:1 compression forged pistons**, paired with **CNC-ported Edelbrock Performer RPM FE heads** and a **Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft** (0.600" lift, 248° duration @ 0.050") for 650+ HP on 93 octane pump gas.

Install a **Holley Dominator 1250 CFM carburetor** with **Quick Fuel Technology annular boosters** and a **Wilson Manifolds dual-plane intake manifold**, coupled with a **MSD Pro-Billet HEI distributor** and **Taylor ThunderVolt 8.8mm silicone spark plug wires** for optimized ignition timing and fuel atomization under high-RPM conditions.

Upgrade the drivetrain with a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** (with a **McLeod twin-disc RST 10.5" clutch** and **SFI-certified bellhousing**) mated to a **Moser Engineering 9" Ford rear end** with **3.70:1 gearing**, **31-spline axles**, and a **Detroit Locker differential** for maximum power transfer to the **BFGoodrich g-Force Rival S 295/35R18 tires** on **Fikse FM-10 18x10.5" wheels**.
estetica: Replace the original aluminum body with a **Superformance MKIII continuation body** featuring **carbon fiber front and rear fenders**, **hood**, and **trunk lid** (weighing 40% less than stock) from **Fiberglass Trends**, finished in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Lime Gold"** with **3M Scotchcal matte black stripes** for a period-correct yet modern aesthetic.

Install a **Rocket Bunny widebody kit** (modified for Cobra 427 chassis) with **custom-fabricated steel rear quarter panels**, **carbon fiber side skirts**, and a **ducktail spoiler** from **AeroFab Works**, paired with **Hella Rallye 3000 headlights** and **Lucas LED taillights** for improved visibility and retro-futuristic styling.

Upgrade the interior with **Recaro SRD full-bucket seats** (retrimmed in **Bridge of Weir leather** with **Alcantara suede inserts**), a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm diameter, quick-release hub), and a **Rolls-Royce-style dashboard** featuring **Smiths gauges** (3.5" speedo, 4" tach, oil pressure, water temp, and fuel level) with **LED backlighting** in **British Racing Green**.
